problem id: fd48ee2f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2)

examples:
  10111101 -> 11110100
  11110010 -> 11001000
  10011100 -> 01110000
  01010101 -> 01010100
  01101001 -> 10100100
  10101100 -> 10110000
  11010000 -> 01000000
  11000100 -> 00010000
  10010011 -> 01001100
  10111000 -> 11100000

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 10110100
